status.sql: SELECT sc."sample_repo_name", SUM(sc."copies") AS "total_copies" FROM "db"."sc"."SAMPLE_CONTENTS" sc JOIN "db"."sc"."LANGUAGES" l ON sc."sample_repo_name" = l."repo_name" WHERE sc."binary" = FALSE AND l."language"::STRING ILIKE '%swift%' GROUP BY sc."sample_repo_name" ORDER BY total_copies DESC LIMIT 1;
solved_subquestions_list: Find the total copies of non-binary Swift files by repository.
